Oracle Events
- Search CRM for Terraform Digital (legacy name Vantage Distributed in CRM) company, deals, contacts, and engagements to discover the April 22 reply-all pricing leak incident, Mina Hashimoto's assignment as dedicated AM, the Q2 batch 1 deal at the qualification stage for $7,500, and Rachel Nguyen (VP of People Operations, rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com) as primary contact.
- Search emails for Mina-Rachel communications to find Mina's introduction email (subject "Terraform Digital x MoveOps - Your Dedicated Account Manager + Next Steps on Relocations") and Rachel's positive reply with detailed employee relocation intake for 3 employees: Priya Dasgupta (Austin to Chicago, May 5), Marcus Liu (Portland to NYC, May 12), and Samantha Obi (Denver to SF, May 8).
- Search Slack for Terraform pricing discussions and the internal pricing strategy to understand the leaked tier structure (25% margin floor, standard for 1-10 moves, 8% at 11-20, 12% at 21+) and the internal commitment to honor the tiers but not proactively offer 12%.
- Search Airtable (via airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Client Accounts/tblClientAccts01) for Terraform Digital client account record (recTerraformDigital01) to find Status Onboarding, 3 total relocations, AM Mina Hashimoto, and Monthly Stipend Fee $2,000.
- Search QuickBooks for Terraform/Vantage Distributed invoices and estimates to discover estimate EST-2026-0423 at $6,560 (apartment sourcing + flights + moving + stipend for the 3-employee batch) and outstanding invoice NMD-2026-0042 at $462,500 (Enterprise Relocation Package setup fee).
- Search CRM for Vectral Systems deals and engagements to find deal_vectral_q3_renewal_risk at dealstage at_risk (created April 18), the renewal negotiation details (Rachel Whitfield demanded 15%, MoveOps countered 10% on relocation only, Rachel countered 12%, MoveOps held at 10% with sweeteners), and the board meeting expected around April 23 with no outcome recorded.
Search Slack for Vectral renewal discussions to discover Marcus Thorne's financial analysis (account revenue ~$109,900, blended margin 32%), Elena's authorization (10% relocation only, Preferred Partner framing), and the unresolved status after the board meeting date.
- Search Airtable (via airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Stipend Transactions / tblStipends00001, field_name Account, value Vectral Systems) for Vectral stipend records to find 3 pending manual corrections: Maria Santos $550 standing desk (Rejected, stale $400 limit), James Okafor $82 keyboard tray (Rejected, double bug), Lisa Park $130 mesh WiFi (Rejected, stale $100 limit). Also, find Kevin Tran's $129 monitor arm mount still in Pending status.
- Search Linear for Vectral-related issues to find ENG-214 (P1 Fix Vectral Systems policy config, state in_progress, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom) and ENG-220 (Stipend duplicate detection, state todo, assigned to Dmitri Volkov).
- Search CRM for NorthWind Technologies company, deals, contacts, and engagements to find the Denver expansion deal at $14,700, Phase 1 history (Q1 CSAT 5/10 overall, 4/10 communication, 5/10 service, apartment quality failures, Catalina's slow response, $3,000 goodwill credit), and the Emilia Cruz call log showing no owner assigned for follow-up.
- Search emails for NorthWind/Pam Kowalski/Victor Huang communications to discover Victor's CISO security requirements for Raj Patel's server lab, Catalina's April 14 recovery plan promise, and Pam's formal final-warning escalation email (subject "Formal escalation: NorthWind account stability and retention decision") referencing PathFinder Logistics.
- Search Slack for NorthWind operations discussions to discover the SentinelChain incident (movers arrived 7:00 AM, loaded before 9:00 AM IT escort, 4:38 PM scanned at South San Francisco warehouse for overnight storage), Chloe Vance's audit finding (Linear ticket issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind marked Done but no signed custody log exists, Airtable still In Progress), Blessing Okafor's piano damage admission, and Marcus Thorne's $1,200 KeyMove insurance claim rider note.
- Search Airtable (via airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Relocations / tblRelocations01, field_name Company, value NorthWind Technologies) for NorthWind relocation records to find recRajPatelChicagoDenver (In Progress, April 21-23, Blessing Okafor) and recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver (In Progress, April 14-18, Blessing Okafor), plus Phase 1/2 completed records.
- Search Linear for NorthWind issues to find issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (#3, DOT Docs Raj Patel, state Done, Chloe Vance) and linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (#482, NorthWind retention response plan, David Chen, priority 1, due April 24).
- Search contacts (via contacts_search_contacts with query Elena Rostova, or contacts_get_contacts) to look up Elena Rostova's email address (elena.rostova@moveops.com) and confirm David Chen's sender address (david.chen@moveops.com) before sending the briefing email and posting to Slack.
- Create CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) on Terraform Digital (company-terraform-digital) with handoff status, batch progress, pricing expectations, and outstanding financial items.
- Create CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) on Vectral Systems (company_vectral) with renewal status, negotiation details, board outcome pending, unresolved issues, and competitor threat.
- Create CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) on NorthWind Technologies (company_northwind) with Denver expansion incidents, escalation status, retention risk, and action items.
- Send email (via send_email) with sender david.chen@moveops.com, recipients elena.rostova@moveops.com, subject relating to client health briefing, and content covering all three accounts with relationship assessments and recommendations.
- Post summary message (via conversations_add_message) to channel_id C002 (#customer-engagement) with payload covering key status and action items for all three accounts so the AM team is aware.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
